product: Change to default pipeline editor for workspaces with the compliance security…
tagline: The Lakeflow Pipelines Editor has been generally available since May 2026.
what_it_does: The Lakeflow Pipelines Editor has been generally available since May 2026. In August, it will become the default editor for developing and debugging pipelines in workspaces with the compliance security profile enabled. At that time the legacy editor will be removed.
